Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants two POWL models representing a hiring process at GlobalTeq Solutions

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Process steps described 1 Resume Parsing Initial Data Check with a loop for missing information RequestMoreInfo 2 Preliminary Skill Assessment sequence after the data check 3 Cultural Fit Community Affiliation Check XOR choice in the unfair model sequence in the fair model 4 Managerial Review Final Decision

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets define the activities ReceiveApplication DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: First Model POWL Model with Potential Unfairness Start with a loop for Data Completeness Loop DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo Followed by SkillAssessment Followed by an XOR choice X CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck Followed by ManagerialReview Followed by FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Wait is ReceiveApplication needed The text says Applicants first submit their resumes Once the basic application data is received So lets include ReceiveApplication at the very beginning

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Wait can I put them all in a linear sequence partial order Yes a linear sequence is just a strict partial order with a total order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Second Model POWL Model Without Unfairness Same loop for data completeness Loop DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck no XOR everyone goes through this ManagerialReview FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This could be modeled as an XOR choice SkillAssessment to XOR Continue Disqualify but the prompt specifies the XOR branch for unfairness at the Cultural Fit stage So the XOR at the Cultural Fit stage is the main focus I will stick to the requested XOR

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets double check the loop definition So for the data completeness loop A DataCompletenessCheck B RequestMoreInfo Loop execute DataCompletenessCheck If complete exit If not execute RequestMoreInfo then DataCompletenessCheck again This perfectly matches the definition

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: Should FinalDecision be an XOR Approve Reject The text says either approving the candidate for hire or rejecting them

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Lets add that XOR to both models for completeness as it reflects the final decision described in the text

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait should FinalDecision be a simple transition or an XOR The prompt suggests FinalDecision as a label I will just use Transition label FinalDecision to keep it simple and aligned with the prompt suggested labels

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The code looks solid properly reflects the process described in the text uses the correct pm4py POWL classes correctly implements the loop and XOR logic and correctly distinguishes the biased model from the unbiased one
